name: GH_BitmapChannel
summary: Lists all possible channels for 24 and 32 bit bitmaps.

enum_values.name: A
enum_values.summary: Alpha channel, not all bitmaps support this.

enum_values.name: RGB
enum_values.summary: Red, Green and Blue channel mashup.

enum_values.name: ARGB
enum_values.summary: Alpha, Red, Green and Blue channel mashup.
